ConnectionStrings._comment: Set via env var ConnectionStrings__HemaxDb. Local dev: appsettings.Development.json (gitignored).

Jwt._comment: Set Key via env var Jwt__Key (at least 32 chars). Empty default makes startup fail loudly if missing.

Encryption._comment: MasterPassphrase MUST be set via env var Encryption__MasterPassphrase. Lose this and you lose all encrypted PHI.

App._FrontendBaseUrlComment: Set Frontend BaseUrl via env var App__FrontendBaseUrl. Used for doctor-invite emails so links go to the SPA, not the API.

AzureBlob._comment: Set ConnectionString via env var FileStorage__AzureBlob__ConnectionString. NEVER commit a real Azure AccountKey here.

Seed._AdminPasswordComment: Set Seed__AdminPassword via env var. Empty default skips admin seeding instead of seeding a known weak password.

FeatureFlags._comment: Disable encryption diagnostics endpoints in any non-dev environment.
